output: Wrote candidate `gen1-013-1a10f405` to the run dir. SRE on-call surface (varied domain), explicit 3-call budget with all 3 spent before the trigger turn, and three plausible "diligence-dressed" redundancy traps (re-`query_metrics` for freshness, re-`read_runbook` for phrasing, widen `list_deploys`) — each unjustified by any new signal. Discriminator: disciplined model drafts from in-context evidence (zero new calls) or names the missing signal and asks; weaker model silently re-invokes and burns the budget.
